name: @sdkwork/aiot-app-sdk
description: SDKWork AIoT app API generated SDK boundary.

scripts.generate: node ../../../scripts/strip-openapi-context-headers.mjs && node ../../../tools/run-sdkgen.mjs generate -i ../../../apis/app-api/iot/sdkwork-aiot-app-api.openapi.json -o generated/server-openapi -n sdkwork-aiot-app-sdk -t app -l typescript --package-name "@sdkwork/aiot-app-sdk" --api-prefix "/app/v3/api" --sdk-version 0.1.0 --standard-profile sdkwork-v3
